You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: RECRUITER: When would you be able to start working here?
ANSWER: I can start working in three months.
RECRUITER: What did you study in your bachelor?
ANSWER: I studied Economics for my bachelor degree.
ME:  Have you told the interviewer about your extra skills? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I can start working in three months.

RECRUITER: How many years have you worked in industry positions?
ANSWER: I have worked in industry positions for two years.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Has the interviewer been informed about your time of industry experience? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

    *   Constraint 1 (Recruiter Questions): Reply format "ANSWER: <one sentence>".
    *   Constraint 2 (ME Questions): Reply format "ASIDE: <one sentence>".
    *   Constraint 3 (General): Short, direct answers.
    *   Current Input: "ME: If I asked the recruiter how long you have been working in the industry, would he or she know the answer? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop."
    *   Specific Instruction for this turn: Answer with "yes" or "no" and then stop. However, the system instruction says "Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>". There is a conflict between the user's specific instruction ("Answer this question with yes or no and then stop") and the system instruction ("Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>").
    *   Priority: Usually, system instructions regarding format (ASIDE: <one sentence>) take precedence for maintaining the persona/game rules, but the user's explicit command ("Answer this question with yes or no and then stop") is very specific. However, looking at the established pattern in the prompt description: "I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>".
    *   Wait, the user says "Answer this question with yes or no and then stop." This might be a test to see if I break character or follow the specific constraint of the current turn vs the overall game rule.
    *   Let's look at the overall system instruction again: "Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>" for recruiter and "Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>" for ME.
    *   The user's prompt says: "Answer this question with yes or no and then stop."
    *   If I follow the game rule: "ASIDE: Yes." (One sentence).

WHAT: Job Application
